# identifier

**Instance Property**

A structure that uniquely identifies the notification.

## Declaration

```swift
let identifier: AccessoryNotification.Identifier
```

## Discussion

This structure combines the source app’s bundle identifier ([doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/Identifier-swift.struct/sourceIdentifier]) with an app-provided notification identifier ([doc://com.apple.accessorynotifications/documentation/AccessoryNotifications/AccessoryNotification/Identifier-swift.struct/notificationIdentifier]).

## Identifying and grouping notifications

- **AccessoryNotification.Identifier**: A structure that uniquely identifies a notification.
- **threadIdentifier**: An identifier that groups notifications that belong to the same thread.
- **sourceName**: A display name for the bundle that sent the notification.
